TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_millet_Muu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: Uh tepaku masi'ʉnʉ'ʉna iiku ia cuma Mu'u.
S.PHON: uh tepaku masiʔɨnɨʔɨna iiku ia ʦuma muʔu.
S.FORM: Uh tepaku masi'ʉnʉ'ʉna iiku ia cuma Mu'u.
S.PHON: uh tepaku masiʔɨnɨʔɨna iiku ia ʦuma muʔu.
S.TRANSL: 我還要再說一遍,我是Mu'u叔叔.
I will speak again. I am uncle Mu'u.

S.FORM: tepaku masi'ʉnʉ'ʉna sii.
S.PHON: tepaku masiʔɨnɨʔɨna sii.
S.FORM: tepaku masi'ʉnʉ'ʉna sii.
S.PHON: tepaku masiʔɨnɨʔɨna sii.
S.TRANSL: 我還要再說一遍,因為…
I will speak again because…

S.FORM: kan muruvuarʉcuku pokarikari.
S.PHON: kan mur~ɾuvuar~ɾɨʦuku pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.FORM: kan muruvuarʉcuku pokarikari.
S.PHON: kan mur~ɾuvuar~ɾɨʦuku pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 其實我已經厭倦說了.
To tell the truth, I have felt tired to talk about this.

S.FORM: sua ciausoumia iisi ia 'apasiʉnʉ'ʉna 'ikua u turucu karimaku.
S.PHON: sua ʦiausoumia iisi ia ʔapasiɨnɨʔɨna ʔikua u tur~ɾuʦu kar~ɾimaku.
S.FORM: sua ciausoumia iisi ia 'apasiʉnʉ'ʉna 'ikua u turucu karimaku.
S.PHON: sua ʦiausoumia iisi ia ʔapasiɨnɨʔɨna ʔikua u tur~ɾuʦu kar~ɾimaku.

TRANSL.notes: 我們這位教授呢,讓我重複說了,我說了3次(三種話).

S.TRANSL: 我們這位教授呢,讓我重複說了,我說了3次 .
This, our professor asked me to say this again, which I have already said for three times.

S.FORM: 'apasiʉnʉ'ʉna 'ikua sii tavarʉ'ʉkukan pokarikari.
S.PHON: ʔapasiɨnɨʔɨna ʔikua sii tavar~ɾɨʔɨkukan pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.FORM: 'apasiʉnʉ'ʉna 'ikua sii tavarʉ'ʉkukan pokarikari.
S.PHON: ʔapasiɨnɨʔɨna ʔikua sii tavar~ɾɨʔɨkukan pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.

TRANSL.notes: 讓我再次說是因為據說我很會說話 (引用宋教授說的).

S.TRANSL: 讓我再次說是因為據說我很會說話 .
She made me say this again because that I am good at speaking.

S.FORM: teciku poisua vina'ʉ siaumi kisaataurho.
S.PHON: teʦiku poisua vinaʔɨ siaumi kisaataur~ɾho.
S.FORM: teciku poisua vina'ʉ siaumi kisaataurho.
S.PHON: teʦiku poisua vinaʔɨ siaumi kisaataur~ɾho.
S.TRANSL: 我要說關於小米的事,也就是外省人所說的小米.
I will say something about the millet which is the so-called siau mi in Chinese

S.FORM: su vina'ʉ sua mamarangta miana ia bak kan tavarʉ'ʉ.
S.PHON: su vinaʔɨ sua mamar~ɾaŋta miana ia *ak kan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ.
S.FORM: su vina'ʉ sua mamarangta miana ia bak kan tavarʉ'ʉ.
S.PHON: su vinaʔɨ sua mamar~ɾaŋta miana ia *ak kan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 小米,我們的長輩以前是知道.
Millet, our elders knew in the past time.

S.FORM: imo noo ikita kanakanavu ia tavara'a mamia ikamu maman tati'ing sua marivina'ʉ teci marivina'ʉ ia.
S.PHON: imo noo ikita kanakanavu ia tavar~ɾaʔa mamia ikamu maman tatiʔiŋ sua mar~ɾivinaʔɨ teʦi mar~ɾivinaʔɨ ia.
S.FORM: imo noo ikita kanakanavu ia tavara'a mamia ikamu maman tati'ing sua marivina'ʉ teci marivina'ʉ ia.
S.PHON: imo noo ikita kanakanavu ia tavar~ɾaʔa mamia ikamu maman tatiʔiŋ sua mar~ɾivinaʔɨ teʦi mar~ɾivinaʔɨ ia.
S.TRANSL: 所以當我們Kanakanavu收割小米時,你們後代的小朋友們,要注意.
So when we Kanakanavu are harvesting the millet, know that you little children.

S.FORM: kaisisiin pa kaisisiin pa sii nen vanai tia kaisisi.
S.PHON: kaisisiin pa kaisisiin pa sii nen vanai tia kaisisi.
S.FORM: kaisisiin pa kaisisiin pa sii nen vanai tia kaisisi.
S.PHON: kaisisiin pa kaisisiin pa sii nen vanai tia kaisisi.

TRANSL.notes: 要先給予祭祀.要先給予祭祀, 因為… 為什麼(因何)要祭祀呢?

S.TRANSL: 要先給予祭祀.要先給予祭祀, 因為… 為什麼 要祭祀呢?
We have to worship first. We have to worship first, because…Why do we worship?

S.FORM: sii sua kisaamamarangmita miana ia.
S.PHON: sii sua kisaamamar~ɾaŋmita miana ia.
S.FORM: sii sua kisaamamarangmita miana ia.
S.PHON: sii sua kisaamamar~ɾaŋmita miana ia.

TRANSL.notes: (是)因為我們以前老人家所說的.

S.TRANSL: 因為我們以前老人家所說的.
It is because of what our elders said in the past time

W.TRANSL: 說-關係詞=長者=1PL.屬格.包含

S.FORM: sua vina'ʉ ia noo 'esi cia aruun ia tavaru'ucu tamu kakangca tecu tecu kaisisi kanakanavu iisi cakʉrʉ tia misee.
S.PHON: sua vinaʔɨ ia noo ʔesi ʦia ar~ɾuun ia tavar~ɾuʔuʦu tamu kakaŋʦa teʦu teʦu kaisisi kanakanavu iisi ʦakɨr~ɾɨ tia misee.
S.FORM: sua vina'ʉ ia noo 'esi cia aruun ia tavaru'ucu tamu kakangca tecu tecu kaisisi kanakanavu iisi cakʉrʉ tia misee.
S.PHON: sua vinaʔɨ ia noo ʔesi ʦia ar~ɾuun ia tavar~ɾuʔuʦu tamu kakaŋʦa teʦu teʦu kaisisi kanakanavu iisi ʦakɨr~ɾɨ tia misee.
S.TRANSL: 這個小米呢, 若要採收的時候, 天上的祖先就已經知道說這些Kanakancu人要在聚會所祭祀了.
If it is time to harvest the millet, fathers in heaven would had already known that these kanakanavu people were going to worship in the chamber.

S.FORM: iimo noo teci marivina'ʉ ia patanganaiin pa.
S.PHON: iimo noo teʦi mar~ɾivinaʔɨ ia pataŋanaiin pa.
S.FORM: iimo noo teci marivina'ʉ ia patanganaiin pa.
S.PHON: iimo noo teʦi mar~ɾivinaʔɨ ia pataŋanaiin pa.
S.TRANSL: 所以若要收割小米, 還要先說出名字.
So if the time to harvest the millet has come, we have to call the name first.

S.FORM: Oh! ka'an matanganai kisuun kan kaisis curu.
S.PHON: oh! kaʔan mataŋanai kisuun kan kaisis ʦur~ɾu.
S.FORM: Oh! ka'an matanganai kisuun kan kaisis curu.
S.PHON: oh! kaʔan mataŋanai kisuun kan kaisis ʦur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 喔!不是所謂的命名,其實是真正的祭祀.
Oh! It's not the so-called naming, but is to really worship.

S.FORM: umavici can pania mokusa tisʉkara vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: umaviʦi ʦan pania mokusa tisɨkar~ɾa vinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: umavici can pania mokusa tisʉkara vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: umaviʦi ʦan pania mokusa tisɨkar~ɾa vinaʔɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 要帶一瓶(酒)去小米(田)裡面.

S.TRANSL: 要帶一瓶 去小米 裡面.

TRANSL.notes: We have to carry one bottle (of wine) to the millet (field).

S.TRANSL: We have to carry one bottle to the millet .

S.FORM: katatamu paku'uru mamarang tumaturu.
S.PHON: katatamu pakuʔur~ɾu mamar~ɾaŋ tumatur~ɾu.
S.FORM: katatamu paku'uru mamarang tumaturu.
S.PHON: katatamu pakuʔur~ɾu mamar~ɾaŋ tumatur~ɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 祭酒, 先讓祖先喝(酒)告訴老人家.

S.TRANSL: 祭酒, 先讓祖先喝 告訴老人家.

TRANSL.notes: (We) give the wine to ancestors first and tell them.

S.TRANSL: give the wine to ancestors first and tell them.

S.FORM: mamarang tavara'a mamia sii sua iikim ia mo nipate'imu mamanu.
S.PHON: mamar~ɾaŋ tavar~ɾaʔa mamia sii sua iikim ia mo nipateʔimu mamanu.
S.FORM: mamarang tavara'a mamia sii sua iikim ia mo nipate'imu mamanu.
S.PHON: mamar~ɾaŋ tavar~ɾaʔa mamia sii sua iikim ia mo nipateʔimu mamanu.

TRANSL.notes: 祖先阿! 要知道, 因為我們是你們僅留存的小孩(後代).

S.TRANSL: 祖先阿! 要知道, 因為我們是你們僅留存的小孩 .
Oh Fathers! Please know, because we are your children you left.

S.FORM: kanakanavu ia kanakanavu ia tecikim marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: kanakanavu ia kanakanavu ia teʦikim mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: kanakanavu ia kanakanavu ia tecikim marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: kanakanavu ia kanakanavu ia teʦikim mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 我們卡那卡那富人要收割小米了.
We Kanakanavu were going to harvest millet.

S.FORM: aranai taniara soni ia tecikim marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: ar~ɾanai taniar~ɾa soni ia teʦikim mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: aranai taniara soni ia tecikim marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: ar~ɾanai taniar~ɾa soni ia teʦikim mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 從今天開始, 我們要收割小米了.
From today on, we are going to harvest millet.

S.FORM: sua karimu mamarang ia makasi kimia.
S.PHON: sua kar~ɾimu mamar~ɾaŋ ia makasi kimia.
S.FORM: sua karimu mamarang ia makasi kimia.
S.PHON: sua kar~ɾimu mamar~ɾaŋ ia makasi kimia.
S.TRANSL: 你們祖先所說的話, 這樣對我們說.
You elders' words speak to us like this

S.FORM: iikam mamanmaku sua nimarivina'ʉcukamu ia masiraru tecukam mookusa cakʉrʉ kaisisi misee.
S.PHON: iikam mamanmaku sua nimar~ɾivinaʔɨʦukamu ia masir~ɾar~ɾu teʦukam mookusa ʦakɨr~ɾɨ kaisisi misee.
S.FORM: iikam mamanmaku sua nimarivina'ʉcukamu ia masiraru tecukam mookusa cakʉrʉ kaisisi misee.
S.PHON: iikam mamanmaku sua nimar~ɾivinaʔɨʦukamu ia masir~ɾar~ɾu teʦukam mookusa ʦakɨr~ɾɨ kaisisi misee.

TRANSL.notes: 你們,我的孩子們,你們收割小米之後, (交代)說: 你們應該要去聚會所祭祀.

S.TRANSL: 你們,我的孩子們,你們收割小米之後, 說: 你們應該要去聚會所祭祀.
You, my children, after you have harvested the millet, saying: 'you should go to the council hall to worship.

W.TRANSL: 過去-主焦.拿-小米-過去=2PL.主格

S.FORM: iimo sua marivina'ʉ ia kaan tavʉ mo'upopaang.
S.PHON: iimo sua mar~ɾivinaʔɨ ia kaan tavɨ moʔupopaaŋ.
S.FORM: iimo sua marivina'ʉ ia kaan tavʉ mo'upopaang.
S.PHON: iimo sua mar~ɾivinaʔɨ ia kaan tavɨ moʔupopaaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 所以收割小米(這件事)是不可以隨便的.

S.TRANSL: 所以收割小米 是不可以隨便的.
So the millet harvest you cannot do carelessly.

S.FORM: kʉ sua makai Sumukun sua iikita ia kan ka'upopaang miseekita.
S.PHON: kɨ sua makai sumukun sua iikita ia kan kaʔupopaaŋ miseekita.
S.FORM: kʉ sua makai Sumukun sua iikita ia kan ka'upopaang miseekita.
S.PHON: kɨ sua makai sumukun sua iikita ia kan kaʔupopaaŋ miseekita.
S.TRANSL: 就像布農族說的, 我們說隨便做做.
Like what Bunun said, we said doing things carelessly.

S.FORM: ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ aka moiri moiri sua marivina'ʉ tia maisa teen nanaran iimo sua marivina'ʉ kan 'una kisaa Sumukun.
S.PHON: kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ aka moir~ɾi moir~ɾi sua mar~ɾivinaʔɨ tia maisa teen nanar~ɾan iimo sua mar~ɾivinaʔɨ kan ʔuna kisaa sumukun.
S.FORM: ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ aka moiri moiri sua marivina'ʉ tia maisa teen nanaran iimo sua marivina'ʉ kan 'una kisaa Sumukun.
S.PHON: kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ aka moir~ɾi moir~ɾi sua mar~ɾivinaʔɨ tia maisa teen nanar~ɾan iimo sua mar~ɾivinaʔɨ kan ʔuna kisaa sumukun.
S.TRANSL: 所以關於收割小米,有布農族所說的.
so about the millet reaping, there is what the Sumukun said.

S.FORM: ? murivain kan takusori ia mi na'ʉ ara akia kan vʉkʉsin.
S.PHON: ? mur~ɾivain kan takusor~ɾi ia mi naʔɨ ar~ɾa akia kan vɨkɨsin.
S.FORM: ? murivain kan takusori ia mi na'ʉ ara akia kan vʉkʉsin.
S.PHON: ? mur~ɾivain kan takusor~ɾi ia mi naʔɨ ar~ɾa akia kan vɨkɨsin.
S.TRANSL: 他的頭髮會變沒有.
His hair will disappear

S.FORM: makasua sua Sumukun.
S.PHON: makasua sua sumukun.
S.FORM: makasua sua Sumukun.
S.PHON: makasua sua sumukun.
S.TRANSL: 布農族是那樣的.
Sumukun are like that.

S.FORM: si sua Sumukun ia 'urupaca cu'uan.
S.PHON: si sua sumukun ia ʔur~ɾupaʦa ʦuʔuan.
S.FORM: si sua Sumukun ia 'urupaca cu'uan.
S.PHON: si sua sumukun ia ʔur~ɾupaʦa ʦuʔuan.
S.TRANSL: 因為布農族是用骨頭.
Because Bunun people use bone.

S.FORM: kirengkirengkireng kisʉʉnkee sua cu'uan sua Sumukun.
S.PHON: kir~ɾeŋkir~ɾeŋkir~ɾeŋ kisɨɨnkee sua ʦuʔuan sua sumukun.
S.FORM: kirengkirengkireng kisʉʉnkee sua cu'uan sua Sumukun.
S.PHON: kir~ɾeŋkir~ɾeŋkir~ɾeŋ kisɨɨnkee sua ʦuʔuan sua sumukun.
S.TRANSL: 布農族說骨頭是kireng kireng kireng.
Sumukun they call bone as kireng kireng kireng.

TRANSL.notes: (撞擊的聲音)

S.FORM: iikita kanakanavu ia akia maka(s)ua si masirarukita ka'an 'urupaca cu'uan.
S.PHON: iikita kanakanavu ia akia maka(s)ua si masir~ɾar~ɾukita kaʔan ʔur~ɾupaʦa ʦuʔuan.
S.FORM: iikita kanakanavu ia akia maka(s)ua si masirarukita ka'an 'urupaca cu'uan.
S.PHON: iikita kanakanavu ia akia maka(s)ua si masir~ɾar~ɾukita kaʔan ʔur~ɾupaʦa ʦuʔuan.
S.TRANSL: 我們kanakanavu,沒有那樣,因為我們原本就不用骨頭.
We kanakanavu do not have that because we have never used bone at all.

S.FORM: sua iikita ia katataam mavici tava can pania.
S.PHON: sua iikita ia katataam maviʦi tava ʦan pania.
S.FORM: sua iikita ia katataam mavici tava can pania.
S.PHON: sua iikita ia katataam maviʦi tava ʦan pania.
S.TRANSL: 我們祭酒會攜帶一個瓶子.
We bring a bottle for the libation.

S.FORM: vina'ʉ tia tonanta marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: vinaʔɨ tia tonanta mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: vina'ʉ tia tonanta marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: vinaʔɨ tia tonanta mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 收割小米.
reaped the millet.

S.FORM: Oh! tamoo! mamarang tuturun kamu.
S.PHON: oh! tamoo! mamar~ɾaŋ tutur~ɾun kamu.
S.FORM: Oh! tamoo! mamarang tuturun kamu.
S.PHON: oh! tamoo! mamar~ɾaŋ tutur~ɾun kamu.

TRANSL.notes: 祖先阿~(我)要告訴你們.

S.TRANSL: 祖先阿~ 要告訴你們.
Oh! Fathers! I want to tell you.

S.FORM: taniara soni ia tecikim marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: taniar~ɾa soni ia teʦikim mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: taniara soni ia tecikim marivina'ʉ.
S.PHON: taniar~ɾa soni ia teʦikim mar~ɾivinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 今天是我們收割小米的日子.
Today is the day of reaping the millet.

S.FORM: sua karimu mamarang tumuturu kimia ia.
S.PHON: sua kar~ɾimu mamar~ɾaŋ tumutur~ɾu kimia ia.
S.FORM: sua karimu mamarang tumuturu kimia ia.
S.PHON: sua kar~ɾimu mamar~ɾaŋ tumutur~ɾu kimia ia.
S.TRANSL: 關於你們祖先告訴我們的.
The words you ancestors tell us.

S.FORM: noo marivina'ʉci ia.
S.PHON: noo mar~ɾivinaʔɨʦi ia.
S.FORM: noo marivina'ʉci ia.
S.PHON: noo mar~ɾivinaʔɨʦi ia.
S.TRANSL: 當要去收割小米的時候.
At the time to harvest the millet.

S.FORM: masiraru tecukamu mati'ara'arang tia sikaisisiamu cakʉrʉ tia misee.
S.PHON: masir~ɾar~ɾu teʦukamu matiʔar~ɾaʔar~ɾaŋ tia sikaisisiamu ʦakɨr~ɾɨ tia misee.
S.FORM: masiraru tecukamu mati'ara'arang tia sikaisisiamu cakʉrʉ tia misee.
S.PHON: masir~ɾar~ɾu teʦukamu matiʔar~ɾaʔar~ɾaŋ tia sikaisisiamu ʦakɨr~ɾɨ tia misee.
S.TRANSL: 我們老人家會這麼說: 當收割小米的時候,原本你們就要準備好你們要用來祭祀的東西.
We elders would say that at the time to harvest the millet, you should have already prepared the worshipping tools.

S.FORM: si neen vanai sua.
S.PHON: si neen vanai sua.
S.FORM: si neen vanai sua.
S.PHON: si neen vanai sua.
S.TRANSL: 什麼原因呢?
What is the reason?

S.FORM: mamarangmita 'akun ma'upopang misee neci'ire 'unai Sumukun sua tumatin koca'ania? 'akia.
S.PHON: mamar~ɾaŋmita ʔakun maʔupopaŋ misee neʦiʔir~ɾe ʔunai sumukun sua tumatin koʦaʔania? ʔakia.
S.FORM: mamarangmita 'akun ma'upopang misee neci'ire 'unai Sumukun sua tumatin koca'ania? 'akia.
S.PHON: mamar~ɾaŋmita ʔakun maʔupopaŋ misee neʦiʔir~ɾe ʔunai sumukun sua tumatin koʦaʔania? ʔakia.
S.TRANSL: 看哪,布農族會懸掛午餐嗎? 沒有.
Look, does Bunun hang on the lunch? No.

S.FORM: 'inmamia iikita sua Kanakanavu sua tumatin koca'ania.
S.PHON: ʔinmamia iikita sua kanakanavu sua tumatin koʦaʔania.
S.FORM: 'inmamia iikita sua Kanakanavu sua tumatin koca'ania.
S.PHON: ʔinmamia iikita sua kanakanavu sua tumatin koʦaʔania.
S.TRANSL: 只有我們kanakanavu會做這個懸掛午餐的儀式.
Only we kanakanavu do such a hanging-lunch ritual.

S.FORM: iimo ka'an masiraru noo marang marangcuku.
S.PHON: iimo kaʔan masir~ɾar~ɾu noo mar~ɾaŋ mar~ɾaŋʦuku.
S.FORM: iimo ka'an masiraru noo marang marangcuku.
S.PHON: iimo kaʔan masir~ɾar~ɾu noo mar~ɾaŋ mar~ɾaŋʦuku.
S.TRANSL: 我已經老了.
I have aged.

S.FORM: ka'ancuku tavarʉ'ʉ pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng iinia.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦuku tavar~ɾɨʔɨ paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ iinia.
S.FORM: ka'ancuku tavarʉ'ʉ pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng iinia.
S.PHON: kaʔanʦuku tavar~ɾɨʔɨ paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ iinia.
S.TRANSL: 我已經沒辦法考慮到那個.
I cannot think about that.

S.FORM: 'esi pa nia cʉpʉngaku.
S.PHON: ʔesi pa nia ʦɨpɨŋaku.
S.FORM: 'esi pa nia cʉpʉngaku.
S.PHON: ʔesi pa nia ʦɨpɨŋaku.
S.TRANSL: 我所想的還在那邊.
What I thought is still there.

S.FORM: pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ.
S.FORM: pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ.
S.TRANSL: 想.
think.

S.FORM: sua Kanakanavu ia vanai koca'ania? tumaturu tumatuturu tamu kakangca Ah!
S.PHON: sua kanakanavu ia vanai koʦaʔania? tumatur~ɾu tumatutur~ɾu tamu kakaŋʦa ah!
S.FORM: sua Kanakanavu ia vanai koca'ania? tumaturu tumatuturu tamu kakangca Ah!
S.PHON: sua kanakanavu ia vanai koʦaʔania? tumatur~ɾu tumatutur~ɾu tamu kakaŋʦa ah!
S.TRANSL: 卡那卡那富什麼原因要把午餐懸掛,是要敬告在天上的祖先,啊!

TRANSL.notes: What's the reason that Kanakanavu hang the (left) lunch? It is to tell the fathers in heaven. Ah!

S.TRANSL: What's the reason that Kanakanavu hang the lunch? It is to tell the fathers in heaven. Ah!

S.FORM: sua iisi ia 'esikim tia tumat.
S.PHON: sua iisi ia ʔesikim tia tumat.
S.FORM: sua iisi ia 'esikim tia tumat.
S.PHON: sua iisi ia ʔesikim tia tumat.
S.TRANSL: 這是我們要告知…
It is that we will tell…

S.FORM: kaisisi cakʉrʉ misee sua.
S.PHON: kaisisi ʦakɨr~ɾɨ misee sua.
S.FORM: kaisisi cakʉrʉ misee sua.
S.PHON: kaisisi ʦakɨr~ɾɨ misee sua.
S.TRANSL: 說,祭祀聚會所.
say 'worship chamber.

S.FORM: tumatin koca'ania.
S.PHON: tumatin koʦaʔania.
S.FORM: tumatin koca'ania.
S.PHON: tumatin koʦaʔania.
S.TRANSL: 懸掛午餐.
hanging lunch

S.FORM: iimo sua Kanakanavu miana ia noo nimukʉrʉkia vutuukuru.
S.PHON: iimo sua kanakanavu miana ia noo nimukɨr~ɾɨkia vutuukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: iimo sua Kanakanavu miana ia noo nimukʉrʉkia vutuukuru.
S.PHON: iimo sua kanakanavu miana ia noo nimukɨr~ɾɨkia vutuukur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們曾經握過魚,
Once we had gripped fish,

S.FORM: 'arasakai apasu ia manasʉ tekia maramucu ka'ankia tavarʉ'ʉ ʉmʉkʉrʉ toomarʉ pangi tarʉkʉra nokai.
S.PHON: ʔar~ɾasakai apasu ia manasɨ tekia mar~ɾamuʦu kaʔankia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ɨmɨkɨr~ɾɨ toomar~ɾɨ paŋi tar~ɾɨkɨr~ɾa nokai.
S.FORM: 'arasakai apasu ia manasʉ tekia maramucu ka'ankia tavarʉ'ʉ ʉmʉkʉrʉ toomarʉ pangi tarʉkʉra nokai.
S.PHON: ʔar~ɾasakai apasu ia manasɨ tekia mar~ɾamuʦu kaʔankia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ɨmɨkɨr~ɾɨ toomar~ɾɨ paŋi tar~ɾɨkɨr~ɾa nokai.
S.TRANSL: 我們若曾經觸碰到魚蝦螃蟹,我們一定要先洗手, 我們不能觸碰簸箕杵臼.
If we had once touched any fish, shrimp or crab, we must have washed our hand first, we cannot not touch the dustpan, pestle and mortar.

S.FORM: nimaramucu ia aka.
S.PHON: nimar~ɾamuʦu ia aka.
S.FORM: nimaramucu ia aka.
S.PHON: nimar~ɾamuʦu ia aka.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們不先洗手,那是不好的.
If we do not washed our hand first, this is bad.

S.FORM: si tia pooravu misee sua mamarang.
S.PHON: si tia poor~ɾavu misee sua mamar~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: si tia pooravu misee sua mamarang.
S.PHON: si tia poor~ɾavu misee sua mamar~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 因為會使我們飢餓,我們老人家是這樣說的.
Because this will make us hungry. This is what our elders said.

S.FORM: iimo 'akun sua iikamu po'upopopang.
S.PHON: iimo ʔakun sua iikamu poʔupopopaŋ.
S.FORM: iimo 'akun sua iikamu po'upopopang.
S.PHON: iimo ʔakun sua iikamu poʔupopopaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 所以你們不要隨便.
So do not do this unceremoniously.

S.FORM: necire kan 'unakita kanakanavu kanakanavu mahin makai iikua makaa 'esicu miaranasʉ.
S.PHON: neʦir~ɾe kan ʔunakita kanakanavu kanakanavu mahin makai iikua makaa ʔesiʦu miar~ɾanasɨ.
S.FORM: necire kan 'unakita kanakanavu kanakanavu mahin makai iikua makaa 'esicu miaranasʉ.
S.PHON: neʦir~ɾe kan ʔunakita kanakanavu kanakanavu mahin makai iikua makaa ʔesiʦu miar~ɾanasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 看! 現在有我們kanakanavu人,像我們這樣子在困苦著.
Look! Now there are we kanakanavu people like me living a harder life.

S.FORM: ka'an ma ka'an ma pasʉkʉn ka'an madamu kisaa su Sumukun ia.
S.PHON: kaʔan ma kaʔan ma pasɨkɨn kaʔan ma*amu kisaa su sumukun ia.
S.FORM: ka'an ma ka'an ma pasʉkʉn ka'an madamu kisaa su Sumukun ia.
S.PHON: kaʔan ma kaʔan ma pasɨkɨn kaʔan ma*amu kisaa su sumukun ia.
S.TRANSL: 就是布農族所說的不守禁忌.
it just what Sumukun said: disobeying the taboo.

S.FORM: sua kari kanakanavu ia.
S.PHON: sua kar~ɾi kanakanavu ia.
S.FORM: sua kari kanakanavu ia.
S.PHON: sua kar~ɾi kanakanavu ia.
S.TRANSL: 用我們kanakanavu的話.
In our kanakanavu language.

S.FORM: ka'an pasiakʉ.
S.PHON: kaʔan pasiakɨ.
S.FORM: ka'an pasiakʉ.
S.PHON: kaʔan pasiakɨ.
S.TRANSL: 不遵守禁忌.
They disobey the taboo.

S.FORM: ka'an pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: kaʔan paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ.
S.FORM: ka'an pacʉpʉngcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: kaʔan paʦɨpɨŋʦɨpɨŋ.
S.TRANSL: 沒有考慮.
they do not think about this.

S.FORM: akia cʉpʉngin sua iisi ia.
S.PHON: akia ʦɨpɨŋin sua iisi ia.
S.FORM: akia cʉpʉngin sua iisi ia.
S.PHON: akia ʦɨpɨŋin sua iisi ia.
S.TRANSL: 他的心裡沒有這個.
There is no this in his mind.

S.FORM: pu'isiava misee.
S.PHON: puʔisiava misee.
S.FORM: pu'isiava misee.
S.PHON: puʔisiava misee.
S.TRANSL: 原來這是個禁忌阿!
It is a taboo!

S.FORM: iimo sua iikita kanakanavu noo nimarivina'ʉcikita ia manasʉ tekita kaisisicu.
S.PHON: iimo sua iikita kanakanavu noo nimar~ɾivinaʔɨʦikita ia manasɨ tekita kaisisiʦu.
S.FORM: iimo sua iikita kanakanavu noo nimarivina'ʉcikita ia manasʉ tekita kaisisicu.
S.PHON: iimo sua iikita kanakanavu noo nimar~ɾivinaʔɨʦikita ia manasɨ tekita kaisisiʦu.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們收割小米之後, 就一定要祭祀了.
so, if we kanakanavu people have harvested the millet, we will have to worship.

W.TRANSL: 完成-主焦.拿-小米=過去=1PL.排除.主格

S.FORM: kisaa taulho na cie pae manasʉ tekita kaisisi.
S.PHON: kisaa tau*ho na ʦie pae manasɨ tekita kaisisi.
S.FORM: kisaa taulho na cie pae manasʉ tekita kaisisi.
S.PHON: kisaa tau*ho na ʦie pae manasɨ tekita kaisisi.
S.TRANSL: 用國語說我們一定要在七月或八月祭祀.
to say in Chinese, we must worship in July or August

S.FORM: takupan fungnianji kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: takupan fuŋnianji kisɨɨn.
S.FORM: takupan fungnianji kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: takupan fuŋnianji kisɨɨn.
S.TRANSL: 就是所謂的豐年祭.
the so-called Harvest Festival.

W.TRANSL: 布農族其中一個祭典名

M.TRANSL: 布農族其中一個祭典名

S.FORM: nakai sua makai kisaa jiaushoumia iisi ia.
S.PHON: nakai sua makai kisaa jiaushoumia iisi ia.
S.FORM: nakai sua makai kisaa jiaushoumia iisi ia.
S.PHON: nakai sua makai kisaa jiaushoumia iisi ia.
S.TRANSL: 但是就像我們這位教授所說的.
but just like what this our professor said.

S.FORM: nononoman.
S.PHON: nononoman.
S.FORM: nononoman.
S.PHON: nononoman.
S.TRANSL: 很多東西.
many things.

S.FORM: upeen vuan tiacu patiara'arangamu tia sikaisisi misee.
S.PHON: upeen vuan tiaʦu patiar~ɾaʔar~ɾaŋamu tia sikaisisi misee.
S.FORM: upeen vuan tiacu patiara'arangamu tia sikaisisi misee.
S.PHON: upeen vuan tiaʦu patiar~ɾaʔar~ɾaŋamu tia sikaisisi misee.
S.TRANSL: 我們這位教授所問的: 什麼東西,幾月份你們要準備祭祀了.
like what our professor said, 'how many months will you prepare for your worships?'

S.FORM: tekara can vuan.
S.PHON: tekar~ɾa ʦan vuan.
S.FORM: tekara can vuan.
S.PHON: tekar~ɾa ʦan vuan.

TRANSL.notes: (有需)要一個月嗎?!

S.TRANSL: 要一個月嗎?!
Does it need one month?

S.FORM: kooku mara tia can vuan.
S.PHON: kooku mar~ɾa tia ʦan vuan.
S.FORM: kooku mara tia can vuan.
S.PHON: kooku mar~ɾa tia ʦan vuan.
S.TRANSL: 我不需要一個月.
I do not take one month.

S.FORM: kan tia can ma.
S.PHON: kan tia ʦan ma.
S.FORM: kan tia can ma.
S.PHON: kan tia ʦan ma.
S.TRANSL: 我只要一.
I probably need one…

S.FORM: u can matakananga taniarʉ kisuunmaku.
S.PHON: u ʦan matakanaŋa taniar~ɾɨ kisuunmaku.
S.FORM: u can matakananga taniarʉ kisuunmaku.
S.PHON: u ʦan matakanaŋa taniar~ɾɨ kisuunmaku.
S.TRANSL: 我可能只要一個小時.
I only need one hour.

S.FORM: putuvakavakaan macaca.
S.PHON: putuvakavakaan maʦaʦa.
S.FORM: putuvakavakaan macaca.
S.PHON: putuvakavakaan maʦaʦa.
S.TRANSL: 她高興地笑,眼神閃亮.
She kept laughing with surprise.

S.FORM: tumana karimaku.
S.PHON: tumana kar~ɾimaku.
S.FORM: tumana karimaku.
S.PHON: tumana kar~ɾimaku.
S.TRANSL: 聽到我的話.
heard my words

S.FORM: iimo makahi iikua po'isua pa vina'ʉ mi.
S.PHON: iimo makahi iikua poʔisua pa vinaʔɨ mi.
S.FORM: iimo makahi iikua po'isua pa vina'ʉ mi.
S.PHON: iimo makahi iikua poʔisua pa vinaʔɨ mi.
S.TRANSL: 所以對我說還要再說關於小米的事.
so say to me about the story of millet again.

S.FORM: neen vanaimu kumakarai vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: neen vanaimu kumakar~ɾai vinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: neen vanaimu kumakarai vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: neen vanaimu kumakar~ɾai vinaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 你們什麼原因耕作小米.
What are your reasons to plant millet?

S.FORM: Uh 'emu pakarʉ'ʉ 'apakasiin nanu niaracumu vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: uh ʔemu pakar~ɾɨʔɨ ʔapakasiin nanu niar~ɾaʦumu vinaʔɨ.
S.FORM: Uh 'emu pakarʉ'ʉ 'apakasiin nanu niaracumu vina'ʉ.
S.PHON: uh ʔemu pakar~ɾɨʔɨ ʔapakasiin nanu niar~ɾaʦumu vinaʔɨ.

TRANSL.notes: (教授)對著我問說你們什麼原因種植小米,你們怎麼處理所拿的小米?

S.TRANSL: 對著我問說你們什麼原因種植小米,你們怎麼處理所拿的小米?
'Where do you deal with those millet you took?' said to me.

S.FORM: iimo sua kanakanvu ia ka'an roimi vina'ʉ sii masiraru nipatanganara noo tia sikaisisi cakʉrʉ misee.
S.PHON: iimo sua kanakanvu ia kaʔan r~ɾoimi vinaʔɨ sii masir~ɾar~ɾu nipataŋanar~ɾa noo tia sikaisisi ʦakɨr~ɾɨ misee.
S.FORM: iimo sua kanakanvu ia ka'an roimi vina'ʉ sii masiraru nipatanganara noo tia sikaisisi cakʉrʉ misee.
S.PHON: iimo sua kanakanvu ia kaʔan r~ɾoimi vinaʔɨ sii masir~ɾar~ɾu nipataŋanar~ɾa noo tia sikaisisi ʦakɨr~ɾɨ misee.

TRANSL.notes: 所以我們卡那卡那富人不會忘記小米,因為我們已經被(傳統/祖先)指定,若…(完成收割小米)就要到聚會所祭祀.

S.TRANSL: 所以我們卡那卡那富人不會忘記小米,因為我們已經被 指定,若… 就要到聚會所祭祀.

TRANSL.notes: So we will not forget about millet, because we are originally assigned that if…(finishing millet harvest) (we) will worship in the chamber, as our tradition goes.

S.TRANSL: So we will not forget about millet, because we are originally assigned that if… will worship in the chamber, as our tradition goes.

S.FORM: neen vanai kaisisi cakUrU mee.
S.PHON: neen vanai kaisisi ʦakur~ɾu mee.
S.FORM: neen vanai kaisisi cakUrU mee.
S.PHON: neen vanai kaisisi ʦakur~ɾu mee.
S.TRANSL: 什麼原因說要在聚會所祭祀呢?

TRANSL.notes: For what reason is it said that (we) have to worship in the chamber?

S.TRANSL: For what reason is it said that have to worship in the chamber?

S.FORM: aranai na tumatin koca'ania misee.
S.PHON: ar~ɾanai na tumatin koʦaʔania misee.
S.FORM: aranai na tumatin koca'ania misee.
S.PHON: ar~ɾanai na tumatin koʦaʔania misee.

TRANSL.notes: (這件事)是從懸掛午餐(儀式)開始.

S.TRANSL: 是從懸掛午餐 開始.

TRANSL.notes: (It) starts from hanging the lunch.

S.TRANSL: starts from hanging the lunch.

S.FORM: neen tuma cumuraan ngu cikamu 'unain Sumukun tumatin koca'ania akia.
S.PHON: neen tuma ʦumur~ɾaan ŋu ʦikamu ʔunain sumukun tumatin koʦaʔania akia.
S.FORM: neen tuma cumuraan ngu cikamu 'unain Sumukun tumatin koca'ania akia.
S.PHON: neen tuma ʦumur~ɾaan ŋu ʦikamu ʔunain sumukun tumatin koʦaʔania akia.

TRANSL.notes: 你們看,布農族有懸掛午餐(的儀式)嗎? 沒有.

S.TRANSL: 你們看,布農族有懸掛午餐 嗎? 沒有.
You see, do Bunun people have the ritual of hanging the lunch? No.

S.FORM: imamia iikita kanakanavu.
S.PHON: imamia iikita kanakanavu.
S.FORM: imamia iikita kanakanavu.
S.PHON: imamia iikita kanakanavu.

TRANSL.notes: 只有我們卡那卡那富人(有).

S.TRANSL: 只有我們卡那卡那富人 .
Only we Kanakanavu people do.

S.FORM: nakai sua iikita ia katatamukita ia.
S.PHON: nakai sua iikita ia katatamukita ia.
S.FORM: nakai sua iikita ia katatamukita ia.
S.PHON: nakai sua iikita ia katatamukita ia.
S.TRANSL: 但是呢,我們呢,我們是有祭酒儀式的.
But, we…we libate.

S.FORM: makaiiai iikua akuun roimi sua.
S.PHON: makaiiai iikua akuun r~ɾoimi sua.
S.FORM: makaiiai iikua akuun roimi sua.
S.PHON: makaiiai iikua akuun r~ɾoimi sua.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼不像我一樣,不忘記那個…
Why not be like me, not forget the…

S.FORM: arananaki taniara soni apa'ara kʉʉna 'apara nupasʉ.
S.PHON: ar~ɾananaki taniar~ɾa soni apaʔar~ɾa kɨɨna ʔapar~ɾa nupasɨ.
S.FORM: arananaki taniara soni apa'ara kʉʉna 'apara nupasʉ.
S.PHON: ar~ɾananaki taniar~ɾa soni apaʔar~ɾa kɨɨna ʔapar~ɾa nupasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 期待從今天開始讓我們獲得食物和財富.

TRANSL.notes: (We) wish that from today we are made to receive food and fortune.

S.TRANSL: wish that from today we are made to receive food and fortune.

S.FORM: parakasoo pikim kanakanavu makai kuree.
S.PHON: par~ɾakasoo pikim kanakanavu makai kur~ɾee.
S.FORM: parakasoo pikim kanakanavu makai kuree.
S.PHON: par~ɾakasoo pikim kanakanavu makai kur~ɾee.
S.TRANSL: 讓我們卡那卡那富人獲得的食物和財富像蟲一樣眾多.

TRANSL.notes: Let Kanakanavu people have (food and fortune) as many as insects.

S.TRANSL: Let Kanakanavu people have as many as insects.

S.FORM: misaa kari manasi.
S.PHON: misaa kar~ɾi manasi.
S.FORM: misaa kari manasi.
S.PHON: misaa kar~ɾi manasi.

TRANSL.notes: 一定要那樣說(祭詞).

S.TRANSL: 一定要那樣說 .

TRANSL.notes: (We) must say that way.

S.TRANSL: must say that way.

S.FORM: cucuru manasi neeci'ire iikita.
S.PHON: ʦuʦur~ɾu manasi neeʦiʔir~ɾe iikita.
S.FORM: cucuru manasi neeci'ire iikita.
S.PHON: ʦuʦur~ɾu manasi neeʦiʔir~ɾe iikita.
S.TRANSL: 我們看,這一定是真的.
Let's see. It must be true.

S.FORM: manmanmita kanakanavu map masiin kan maraa 'ecu 'arasurusu 'ara'una 'esi 'ara'una manmanmita Kanakanavu masiin.
S.PHON: manmanmita kanakanavu map masiin kan mar~ɾaa ʔeʦu ʔar~ɾasur~ɾusu ʔar~ɾaʔuna ʔesi ʔar~ɾaʔuna manmanmita kanakanavu masiin.
S.FORM: manmanmita kanakanavu map masiin kan maraa 'ecu 'arasurusu 'ara'una 'esi 'ara'una manmanmita Kanakanavu masiin.
S.PHON: manmanmita kanakanavu map masiin kan mar~ɾaa ʔeʦu ʔar~ɾasur~ɾusu ʔar~ɾaʔuna ʔesi ʔar~ɾaʔuna manmanmita kanakanavu masiin.

TRANSL.notes: 我們現在卡那卡那富的後代,(生活)已經較進步了.我們的後代現在正變得擁有(這些食物財富).

S.TRANSL: 我們現在卡那卡那富的後代, 已經較進步了.我們的後代現在正變得擁有 .
Now our Kanakanavu's offsprings have a better life. Our offsprings have come to have these now.

S.FORM: nakai sua iikita kanaka aaka kana.
S.PHON: nakai sua iikita kanaka aaka kana.
S.FORM: nakai sua iikita kanaka aaka kana.
S.PHON: nakai sua iikita kanaka aaka kana.

TRANSL.notes: 但我們卡那卡那富人(情況)不好.

S.TRANSL: 但我們卡那卡那富人 不好.
But we Kanakanavu people are not in good situation.

S.FORM: iikita Kanakanavu ia natekim na makai cʉpʉngaku ia natia mamanʉng.
S.PHON: iikita kanakanavu ia natekim na makai ʦɨpɨŋaku ia natia mamanɨŋ.
S.FORM: iikita Kanakanavu ia natekim na makai cʉpʉngaku ia natia mamanʉng.
S.PHON: iikita kanakanavu ia natekim na makai ʦɨpɨŋaku ia natia mamanɨŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們卡那卡那富人本來會像我所想的,應該會比較好.
We Kanakanavu people were supposed to get better, as I thought.

S.FORM: nakai iikisa iikita Kanakanavu ia na'uneen makai ti'inge taningininga ma ʉ teni to'ona Kanakanavu ʉtʉmʉkʉ ʉ utuira ia natekita mamanʉng.
S.PHON: nakai iikisa iikita kanakanavu ia naʔuneen makai tiʔiŋe taniŋiniŋa ma ɨ teni toʔona kanakanavu ɨtɨmɨkɨ ɨ utuir~ɾa ia natekita mamanɨŋ.
S.FORM: nakai iikisa iikita Kanakanavu ia na'uneen makai ti'inge taningininga ma ʉ teni to'ona Kanakanavu ʉtʉmʉkʉ ʉ utuira ia natekita mamanʉng.
S.PHON: nakai iikisa iikita kanakanavu ia naʔuneen makai tiʔiŋe taniŋiniŋa ma ɨ teni toʔona kanakanavu ɨtɨmɨkɨ ɨ utuir~ɾa ia natekita mamanɨŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 但我們卡那卡那富人呢,若有像小小的平原,足夠(容納)我們卡那卡那富人聚在一起生活的地方,單純的(沒有其他的族群),我們原本會很好.

S.TRANSL: 但我們卡那卡那富人呢,若有像小小的平原,足夠 我們卡那卡那富人聚在一起生活的地方,單純的 ,我們原本會很好.
But if we Kanakanavu people have something like a small plain which is enough for us to gather and live together, without other ethnic groups, things would have been better.

S.FORM: vaneenkita maraa aaka sii 'ekita 'arakukuun Sumukun.
S.PHON: vaneenkita mar~ɾaa aaka sii ʔekita ʔar~ɾakukuun sumukun.
S.FORM: vaneenkita maraa aaka sii 'ekita 'arakukuun Sumukun.
S.PHON: vaneenkita mar~ɾaa aaka sii ʔekita ʔar~ɾakukuun sumukun.
S.TRANSL: 我們比較不好,因為我們跟布農族在一起.
We're worse, because we are with Bunun people.

S.FORM: neeci'iree tekasu nakuisakasu tekasu mosa naan.
S.PHON: neeʦiʔir~ɾee tekasu nakuisakasu tekasu mosa naan.
S.FORM: neeci'iree tekasu nakuisakasu tekasu mosa naan.
S.PHON: neeʦiʔir~ɾee tekasu nakuisakasu tekasu mosa naan.
S.TRANSL: 你看,'nakuisa=kasu'和'te=kasu mosa naan'.
See, 'nakuisa=kasu' and 'te=kasu mosa naan'.

S.FORM: neeci'iree iisua ia kesa kesa taolho putoncu ihua.
S.PHON: neeʦiʔir~ɾee iisua ia kesa kesa tao*ho putonʦu ihua.
S.FORM: neeci'iree iisua ia kesa kesa taolho putoncu ihua.
S.PHON: neeʦiʔir~ɾee iisua ia kesa kesa tao*ho putonʦu ihua.
S.TRANSL: 你看,那就是外省人所說的不同族.
See, that is what Chinese people call 'different ethnic groups'.

S.FORM: awanaicu 'ancu maatʉa kari.
S.PHON: awanaiʦu ʔanʦu maatɨa kar~ɾi.
S.FORM: awanaicu 'ancu maatʉa kari.
S.PHON: awanaiʦu ʔanʦu maatɨa kar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 語言就不合,不一樣了.
The languages do not match, and are not the same.

S.FORM: na utuira kiteen Kanakanavu ia tekasu mosa naan tia uca'an maa kari i(h)ua.
S.PHON: na utuir~ɾa kiteen kanakanavu ia tekasu mosa naan tia uʦaʔan maa kar~ɾi i(h)ua.
S.FORM: na utuira kiteen Kanakanavu ia tekasu mosa naan tia uca'an maa kari i(h)ua.
S.PHON: na utuir~ɾa kiteen kanakanavu ia tekasu mosa naan tia uʦaʔan maa kar~ɾi i(h)ua.
S.TRANSL: 我們卡那卡那富人如果單一的生活在一起,'你要去哪裡'就只會有那一種說法.
If we Kanakanavu people had lived together, without other groups, 'where are you going' would have only one expression.

S.FORM: AH p' u tekasu mosa nanu tia misee.
S.PHON: ah pʔ u tekasu mosa nanu tia misee.
S.FORM: AH p' u tekasu mosa nanu tia misee.
S.PHON: ah pʔ u tekasu mosa nanu tia misee.
S.TRANSL: 會說: 哎呀,你要去哪裡啊?
We would say: 'Oh, where are you going?'

S.FORM: makasua mamia sua ʉ si sipacʉpʉcʉpʉng vinaʉ iisi.
S.PHON: makasua mamia sua ɨ si sipaʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋ vinaɨ iisi.
S.FORM: makasua mamia sua ʉ si sipacʉpʉcʉpʉng vinaʉ iisi.
S.PHON: makasua mamia sua ɨ si sipaʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋ vinaɨ iisi.
S.TRANSL: 就會那樣以小米來緬懷.
We would think that way.

S.FORM: makasua tia sikaisisita.
S.PHON: makasua tia sikaisisita.
S.FORM: makasua tia sikaisisita.
S.PHON: makasua tia sikaisisita.
S.TRANSL: 我們就會那樣祭祀.
We will worship like that.
